title: mfa — permissions
description: Two permission namespaces: `mfa.*` on the `sanctum` guard for tenant users managing their own MFA, and `platform.mfa.*` on the `platform_admin` guard for support + emergency operations. Guard-namespace isolation is enforced at the RBAC layer — a `sanctum` role can never grant a `platform.mfa.*` permission (identity/access's GuardMismatch 422).

permissions.name: mfa.viewOwn
permissions.description: View own MFA posture. Baseline permission required to render the /me/mfa panel.

permissions.name: mfa.enrollTotp
permissions.description: Enrol a TOTP secret on own Identity.

permissions.name: mfa.disableTotp
permissions.description: Disable the TOTP factor on own Identity. Gated by `mfa.require_recent_challenge` middleware.

permissions.name: mfa.registerWebauthn
permissions.description: Register a new WebAuthn credential on own Identity.

permissions.name: mfa.manageWebauthn
permissions.description: Umbrella permission covering the caller's own WebAuthn credential CRUD (rename / disable / delete). Actual enforcement is delegated per-credential via WebauthnCredentialPolicy (which reads `mfa.webauthn_credentials.update` / `.delete`). Seeded alongside so a role that carries this umbrella permission automatically inherits every child.

permissions.name: mfa.webauthn_credentials.view
permissions.description: View one of own registered WebAuthn credentials.

permissions.name: mfa.webauthn_credentials.update
permissions.description: Rename or disable one of own registered WebAuthn credentials. Gated by `mfa.require_recent_challenge`.

permissions.name: mfa.webauthn_credentials.delete
permissions.description: Hard-delete one of own registered WebAuthn credentials. Gated by `mfa.require_recent_challenge`.

permissions.name: mfa.regenerateRecoveryCodes
permissions.description: Regenerate own recovery-code set. Gated by `mfa.require_recent_challenge`.

permissions.name: mfa.downloadRecoveryCodes
permissions.description: Re-download current recovery-code plaintext. Audit-logged as data-egress. Gated by `mfa.require_recent_challenge`.

permissions.name: mfa.policy.manage
permissions.description: Manage tenant-level MFA policy settings (required_for_roles, grace_days, step-up TTL, WebAuthn policy). Admin + owner only.

permissions.name: platform.mfa.methods.view
permissions.description: View a user's MFA posture across every Application via the shared Identity. Redacted response.

permissions.name: platform.mfa.force_disable
permissions.description: Emergency force-disable MFA for a user. Audit-critical. Requires justification.

permissions.name: platform.mfa.regenerate_recovery_codes
permissions.description: Regenerate recovery codes on behalf of a user + email them. Audit-warn.

permissions.name: platform.mfa.webauthn_credentials.viewAny
permissions.description: List a user's registered WebAuthn credentials for audit or incident-response.

permissions.name: platform.mfa.webauthn_credentials.disable
permissions.description: Disable one of a user's WebAuthn credentials during an incident (reported stolen laptop). Audit-critical.
